product_01.name: Cappuccino
product_01.description: A rich and creamy cappuccino made with freshly brewed espresso, steamed milk, and a frothy milk cap. This delightful drink offers a perfect balance of bold coffee flavor and smooth milk, making it an ideal companion for relaxing mornings or lively conversations.

product_02.name: Latte
product_02.description: Smooth and creamy, our latte combines rich espresso with velvety steamed milk, creating a perfect balance of flavor and texture. Enjoy it as a comforting treat any time of day.

product_03.name: Espresso shot
product_03.description: A bold shot of rich espresso, crafted from the finest beans to deliver a robust flavor in every sip. Perfect for a quick pick-me-up.

product_04.name: Dark chocolate
product_04.description: Rich and indulgent, our dark chocolate drinking chocolate is made with premium cocoa. Perfect for a cozy treat on a chilly day.

product_05.name: Jumbo Savory Scone
product_05.description: Deliciously flaky and buttery, this jumbo savory scone is filled with herbs and cheese, creating a mouthwatering experience.

product_06.name: Chocolate Chip Biscotti
product_06.description: Crunchy and delightful, this chocolate chip biscotti is perfect for dipping in your coffee or enjoying on its own.

product_07.name: Chocolate Croissant
product_07.description: Flaky and buttery, our chocolate croissant is filled with rich chocolate, making it a delightful pastry for any time.

product_08.name: Cranberry Scone
product_08.description: This delightful cranberry scone combines sweet and tart flavors, making it perfect for a breakfast treat or afternoon snack.

product_09.name: Croissant
product_09.description: Our classic croissant is flaky and buttery, offering a delightful crunch with each bite.

product_10.name: Almond Croissant
product_10.description: A delightful twist on the classic croissant, filled with almond cream and topped with slivered almonds for added crunch.

product_11.name: Hazelnut Biscotti
product_11.description: These delicious hazelnut biscotti are perfect for a crunchy treat alongside your coffee.

product_12.name: Ginger Biscotti
product_12.description: These spicy ginger biscotti are perfect for dipping and provide a delightful crunch with every bite.

product_13.name: Oatmeal Scone
product_13.description: Nutty and wholesome, our oatmeal scone is a perfect snack for any time. Made with rolled oats and a hint of sweetness.

product_14.name: Ginger Scone
product_14.description: Soft and fragrant, our ginger scone is perfect for a morning treat, infused with the warm spice of ginger.

product_15.name: Chocolate syrup
product_15.description: Our rich chocolate syrup is perfect for drizzling over desserts or adding to your favorite beverages.

product_16.name: Hazelnut syrup
product_16.description: Add a nutty flavor to your drinks with our hazelnut syrup, perfect for lattes and desserts.

product_17.name: Carmel syrup
product_17.description: Sweet and creamy, our caramel syrup is ideal for topping your drinks and desserts with a rich caramel flavor.

product_18.name: Sugar Free Vanilla syrup
product_18.description: Enjoy the sweet flavor of vanilla without the sugar, making it perfect for your coffee or dessert.
